seo.title: Window Cleaning Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your window cleaning business. Route upset customers to private feedback first. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Window Cleaning
hero.subheading: Sparkling glass is obvious in person and invisible online unless someone posts. ReviewFlo asks right after you pack the squeegee.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Window Cleaning Business Faces

items.heading: Clean windows feel like table stakes
items.body: Customers expect clarity, not a reason to rave.

items.heading: Streaks show up in sunlight hours later
items.body: Frustration lands online after you have left.

items.heading: High ladders make small talk about reviews unlikely
items.body: The job ends when the hose is rolled.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Window Cleaners

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the visit
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link right after the appointment or job.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Send before you drive away
items.body: Catch them while the shine is obvious.

items.heading: Private first if a pane scratched
items.body: Accidents get handled quietly when possible.

items.heading: Residential and storefront
items.body: Same link for homeowners and managers.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.a: Yes, after big spring cleans or post-construction dust.

items.q: What if they notice issues later?
items.a: Private feedback opens a thread for a touch-up visit.

items.a: Batch-send at night if that fits your workflow.
Customers still review the experience, not the gear.
